entry.title: Your second note
entry.summary: Add as many MDX files as you like to src/content/notes/ . They render in file order — keep the numeric 01- , 02- prefix and the most recent at the bottom (or invert the convention; build.js sorts by filename).

entry.title: Your first note
entry.summary: A note is a short fragment — usually one paragraph, sometimes two. The first paragraph becomes the lede on the reader page; subsequent paragraphs become the afterthought. Notes are grouped by month: on /notes/ and surface as the four most recent on the homepage's "From the…
